requirement_topic.en: Consumer Product Safety — Health Canada CCPSA
requirement_topic.zh: 消费品安全——加拿大卫生部CCPSA
requirement_topic.zht: 消費品安全——加拿大衛生部CCPSA

summary.en: Power banks sold to consumers in Canada fall within the consumer product safety framework administered by Health Canada. Under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, manufacturers, importers, advertisers, and sellers must not manufacture, import, advertise, or sell consumer products that are a danger to human health or safety, and must support incident reporting, records, corrective action, and recalls where required.
summary.zh: 在加拿大向消费者销售的移动电源属于加拿大卫生部管理的消费品安全框架。《加拿大消费品安全法》要求制造商、进口商、广告商及销售商不得制造、进口、广告宣传或销售对人体健康或安全构成危险的消费品，并须按要求支持事故报告、记录保存、纠正措施及召回。
summary.zht: 在加拿大向消費者銷售的行動電源屬於加拿大衛生部管理的消費品安全框架。《加拿大消費品安全法》要求製造商、進口商、廣告商及銷售商不得製造、進口、廣告宣傳或銷售對人體健康或安全構成危險的消費品，並須按要求支持事故報告、記錄保存、糾正措施及召回。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21
Health Canada consumer product safety industry guidance
CCPSA incident reporting, document retention, orders, and recall powers

summary.en: China-side compliance often focuses on GB 31241 safety testing, CCC where applicable, factory quality controls, and platform safety documents. Those files may support risk assessment, but they do not replace Canadian importer obligations under the CCPSA or Health Canada's authority to require records, corrective measures, or recalls.
summary.zh: 中国侧合规通常侧重GB 31241安全测试、适用时的CCC、工厂质量控制及平台安全文件。这些文件可支持风险评估，但不能替代加拿大进口商在CCPSA下的义务，也不能替代加拿大卫生部要求记录、纠正措施或召回的权限。
summary.zht: 中國側合規通常側重GB 31241安全測試、適用時的CCC、工廠品質控制及平台安全文件。這些文件可支持風險評估，但不能替代加拿大進口商在CCPSA下的義務，也不能替代加拿大衛生部要求記錄、糾正措施或召回的權限。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Lithium ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment — Safety technical specification
CCC certification for applicable lithium-ion batteries and battery packs in China
China product quality and recall obligations

gap.en: Canada does not treat a Chinese test report as a blanket market clearance. Importers need a defensible safety file for overheating, fire, enclosure, charging, instructions, traceability, incidents, and recalls. Health Canada can act against unsafe consumer products even where a product has passed a foreign standard.
gap.zh: 加拿大不会将中国测试报告视为全面市场放行。进口商需要建立可说明的安全文件，覆盖过热、火灾、外壳、充电、说明书、追溯、事故及召回。即使产品通过外国标准，加拿大卫生部仍可对不安全消费品采取措施。
gap.zht: 加拿大不會將中國測試報告視為全面市場放行。進口商需要建立可說明的安全文件，覆蓋過熱、火災、外殼、充電、說明書、追溯、事故及召回。即使產品通過外國標準，加拿大衛生部仍可對不安全消費品採取措施。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CCPSA applies to consumer products imported, advertised, or sold in Canada unless excluded
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for applicable domestic safety, quality, and certification controls; not a substitute for CCPSA duties

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Canadian consumer safety as a live importer responsibility, not a one-time factory certificate. Keep model-level technical files, incident procedures, and recall readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】应将加拿大消费品安全视为进口商持续责任，而非一次性工厂证书。请保留型号级技术文件、事故处理程序及召回准备。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】應將加拿大消費品安全視為進口商持續責任，而非一次性工廠證書。請保留型號級技術文件、事故處理程序及召回準備。

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website, Government of Canada
